code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Education_GradeSync] --> PENDING: Initialize Node
    
    PENDING --> READY: Dependencies Complete
    PENDING --> SKIPPED: Dependency Failed
    
    READY --> RUNNING: Start Execution
    READY --> SKIPPED: Guard Blocked
    
    RUNNING --> COMPLETE: Success
    RUNNING --> FAILED: Error
    
    FAILED --> READY: Retry (Education_ContentCDN)
    
    COMPLETE --> [Education_ContentCDN]: Terminal
    SKIPPED --> [Education_StudentDB]: Terminal
    
    note right of PENDING
        Waiting for dependencies
        to complete
    end note
    
    note right of READY
        All dependencies satisfied,
        can be scheduled
    end note
    
    note right of RUNNING
        Currently executing
        node handler
    end note
    
    note right of COMPLETE
        Successfully completed
        with output
    end note
    
    note right of FAILED
        Execution failed
        with error
    end note
    
    note right of SKIPPED
        Bypassed due to failed
        dependencies or guards
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为教育系统的成绩同步服务（Education_GradeSync）设计一个完整的状态流转图。核心场景是：节点初始化后进入等待状态，依赖满足后可以执行，执行成功或失败要有不同的终态处理。另外，如果依赖失败或者守护条件不满足，要能跳过执行。
明白了。我梳理一下：GradeSync启动时先进入PENDING等待依赖，依赖完成后进入READY，然后可以开始执行到RUNNING。执行成功到COMPLETE，失败到FAILED。但FAILED之后能直接重试吗？还是回到READY重新排队？
FAILED之后应该可以重试，但要依赖Education_ContentCDN这个外部服务恢复后才能回到READY状态。另外，COMPLETE的终态要指向Education_ContentCDN，SKIPPED的终态指向Education_StudentDB，这两个是不同的数据出口。
好的，我先画出主状态机和这些流转关系。PENDING有两个出口：依赖完成到READY，依赖失败直接到SKIPPED。READY也有两个分支：正常启动到RUNNING，或者被守护条件拦截到SKIPPED。RUNNING执行后成功到COMPLETE，失败到FAILED。
流转逻辑是对的。不过每个状态最好加上注释说明，特别是PENDING要注明是等待依赖完成，READY注明依赖已满足可以调度，RUNNING注明正在执行节点处理器。FAILED和SKIPPED的注释也要区分清楚。

已添加所有状态注释。PENDING右侧注明"Waiting for dependencies to complete"，READY是"All dependencies satisfied, can be scheduled"，RUNNING是"Currently executing node handler"，COMPLETE是"Successfully completed with output"，FAILED是"Execution failed with error"，SKIPPED是"Bypassed due to failed dependencies or guards"。
检查一下终态连接：COMPLETE指向Education_ContentCDN作为终端，SKIPPED指向Education_StudentDB作为终端，这个没问题。但FAILED到READY的重试边，要标注清楚是依赖Education_ContentCDN恢复后才能触发。

确认所有连接和标注：GradeSync初始化进入PENDING，PENDING→READY（依赖完成），PENDING→SKIPPED（依赖失败），READY→RUNNING（开始执行），READY→SKIPPED（守护拦截），RUNNING→COMPLETE（成功），RUNNING→FAILED（错误），FAILED→READY（重试，依赖ContentCDN），COMPLETE→Education_ContentCDN，SKIPPED→Education_StudentDB。六个状态注释都已到位。
